chapter_goal: Make signal-processing and optimization geometry visible through covariance axes, demixing rotations, positive cones, sparse L1 paths, barrier dual coordinates, and score identities.

library_routing.representation: covariance ellipse, whitened cloud, online eigenvector path
library_routing.why: the geometry is a 2D SPD covariance and a unit-sphere learning path

library_routing.concept: ICA as non-Gaussian rotation after whitening
library_routing.why: 2D whitening reduces demixing to an inspectable rotation and moment contrast

library_routing.representation: non-negative cone, learned rays, activation heatmap, residual curve
library_routing.why: multiplicative updates expose the constraint without an opaque optimizer

library_routing.representation: quadratic contours, L1 diamonds, exact polygon projection path
library_routing.why: the diamond boundary and metric projection are planar geometric objects

library_routing.representation: interactive barrier surface with central path and dual straight line
library_routing.why: 3D rotation clarifies boundary blow-up while the dual path is read in a linked panel

library_routing.representation: score divergence contours and score-field identity
library_routing.why: the derivative-based score identity is a numerical integral and contour check

risks: ICA is identifiable only up to permutation and scale, so checks use absolute matched correlations.
NMF is non-unique up to scaling/permutation, so checks use cone/ray alignment and reconstruction rather than exact factor equality.
The barrier example uses a square so the dual path and Hessian can be checked explicitly.

source_span_read.used_for: orientation on section order, terminology, formulas, and concept boundaries only

visual_sequence.inspection_target: PCA axes diagonalize covariance; whitening removes covariance scale; Oja updates approach the first principal axis
visual_sequence.validation: orthonormal eigenvectors, identity whitened covariance, inverse covariance selects the minor axis, small final Oja angle

visual_sequence.inspection_target: PCA decorrelates but does not identify independent non-Gaussian axes; a rotation contrast does
visual_sequence.validation: whitening identity covariance, high recovered-source correlations, Gaussian contrast nearly flat

visual_sequence.inspection_target: NMF explains positive observations by positive rays and positive activations
visual_sequence.validation: non-negative factors, decreasing Frobenius residual, ray alignment

visual_sequence.inspection_target: the sparse path follows the L1 boundary and differs from radial Euclidean shrinkage
visual_sequence.validation: L1 feasibility, monotone objective, radial path suboptimality

visual_sequence.inspection_target: barrier blow-up bends the primal central path while gradient coordinates form a line
visual_sequence.validation: positive slacks, positive Hessian eigenvalues, small dual residual

visual_sequence.inspection_target: Hyvarinen score uses score fields and ignores normalization constants
visual_sequence.validation: nonnegative divergence, score-identity residual, grid optimum near true parameters
